title: Proposal Diff War Room
prompt:
Design "NEXUS Proposal Diff War Room". 16:9 dark interface.
Show two workflow graphs side by side: Current Workflow and Brain Optimized Workflow. Highlight added nodes, removed edges, changed model settings, and new compiler layer. Center overlay: structured diff list. Right panel: risk assessment, missing capabilities, suggested Codex tasks, Apply / Reject / Ask Why buttons.
Visual style: serious review room, not flashy, clear change colors, dense professional UI.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, landscape composition, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
